mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_INTERVIEW_RECORD ( ITV_SN, ITV_RECORD_TTL, ITV_RECORD_CN, FORM_UUID, ITV_PIC_SN, ITV_TRPR_SN, COHORT_SN, CO_SN, ITV_DT ) VALUES ( #{itvSn}, #{itvRecordTtl}, #{itvRecordCn}, #{formUuid}, #{itvPicSn}, #{itvTrprSn}, #{cohortSn}, #{coSn}, #{itvDt} )
mapper.select: /* QueryID : com.kdt.mapper.interviewRecord.countActiveRecordByItvSn Description : 특정 ITV_SN에 대해 활성(DEL_YN=0)된 기록 개수 조회 */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_INTERVIEW_RECORD WHERE ITV_SN = #{itvSn} AND DEL_YN = 0

SELECT i.ITV_RECORD_SN, i.ITV_SN, i.ITV_RECORD_TTL, u1.USER_NM as itvPicNm, i.ITV_PIC_SN, i.VIEW_CNT, i.REG_DT, '면담기록' as postType FROM TB_INTERVIEW_RECORD i LEFT JOIN TB_USER u1 ON u1.USER_SN = i.ITV_PIC_SN LEFT JOIN TB_USER u2 ON u2.USER_SN = i.ITV_TRPR_SN WHERE 1=1 AND DEL_YN = 0 AND COHORT_SN = #{cohortSn} -- 해당 기수 것만 조회 AND ( -- 자기 것만 조회 i.ITV_PIC_SN = #{userSn} OR i.ITV_TRPR_SN = #{userSn} ) ORDER BY ITV_RECORD_SN DESC -- 최신순 LIMIT 100

SELECT i.ITV_RECORD_SN, i.ITV_SN, i.ITV_RECORD_TTL, i.ITV_RECORD_CN, i.FORM_UUID, u1.USER_NM as itvPicNm, -- 면담 담당자 이름 u2.USER_NM as itvTrprNm, -- 면담 대상자 이름 i.ITV_DT, i.COHORT_SN, i.VIEW_CNT, i.REG_DT FROM TB_INTERVIEW_RECORD i LEFT JOIN TB_USER u1 ON u1.USER_SN = i.ITV_PIC_SN LEFT JOIN TB_USER u2 ON u2.USER_SN = i.ITV_TRPR_SN WHERE 1=1 AND DEL_YN = 0 AND ITV_RECORD_SN = #{itvRecordSn} ORDER BY ITV_RECORD_SN DESC -- 최신순 LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_INTERVIEW_RECORD SET VIEW_CNT = VIEW_CNT + 1 WHERE ITV_RECORD_SN = #{itvRecordSn} AND DEL_YN = 0
UPDATE TB_INTERVIEW_RECORD SET DEL_YN = 1 WHERE ITV_RECORD_SN = #{itvRecordSn} AND DEL_YN = 0

UPDATE TB_INTERVIEW_RECORD -- 마지막쉼표 자동제거
ITV_SN = #{itvSn},
ITV_DT = #{itvDt},
ITV_RECORD_TTL = #{itvRecordTtl},
ITV_RECORD_CN = #{itvRecordCn},
FORM_UUID = #{formUuid},
ITV_PIC_SN = #{itvPicSn},
ITV_TRPR_SN = #{itvTrprSn},
WHERE ITV_RECORD_SN = #{itvRecordSn} AND DEL_YN = 0
